dept_bmc_ward_desc: BMC administrative wards, each headed by an Assistant Commissioner overseeing civic services.
dept_bmc_prabhag_desc: BMC electoral wards (Prabhags) with elected corporators responsible for local civic issues.
dept_police_city_desc: Mumbai Police jurisdictions for law and order.
dept_election_pc_desc: Parliamentary constituencies electing Members of Parliament to the Lok Sabha.
dept_election_ac_desc: Assembly constituencies electing Members of Legislative Assembly to the Maharashtra Vidhan Sabha.
dept_admin_district_desc: Revenue district headed by the District Collector for general administration.
dept_admin_taluk_desc: Talukas headed by Tahsildars for revenue collection and land administration.
dept_pincode_desc: Postal PIN code areas served by India Post offices.
